answers: Tidal energy captures the power of ocean tides to generate electricity. It uses the predictable rise and fall of sea levels caused by gravitational forces of the moon and sun.
Tidal energy holo samudrer joyar bhata er force diye electricity produce kora. Eta onek predictable energy source karon tides niyomito hoy.
Tidal power works through tidal barrages, tidal stream generators, or dynamic tidal power systems. It's highly predictable and reliable compared to wind or solar.
Tidal energy is still emerging but very promising. Since tides are completely predictable, tidal power can provide consistent, reliable electricity generation with zero emissions.
